The '''IBC Arcology''' was a building on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that contained the central network [[Computer/Legends|computer]] for the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]], prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HNN" />
